fics.title: Doll God
fics.summary: When Katsuki accidentally defaces a shrine to Deku, he scrambles to make things right before the god closes in on him.***“Kiss me, Kacchan. Not my vessel. Me.”Katsuki’s breaths are stilted, shaky. He arches up and presses his lips against Izuku’s forehead.His skin is warm. Soft. Almost… human.Almost.Katsuki steps back, catching himself a moment before he stumbles. He can’t show any weakness.Izuku gives him a shy little smile. “Not there.”Katsuki swallows thickly, trying to push his heart down from where it’s taken residence in his throat. His instincts, normally sharp as his sword, swim through his muddied mind. “I… You want me to…”When Izuku bites his lower lip, the action looks vulnerable. Inviting. “On the lips."

fics.title: close quarters
fics.summary: Katsuki is heir to the throne of her family’s powerful kingdom in Ancient Japan. Her girlfriend and childhood playmate, Izuku, is a powerful cat spirit who lives in the mountains near the palace grounds— a place that citizens of the kingdom are forbidden to enter, since it is the territory of vicious nekomata, beastly feline spirits that hunt and prowl through the wilderness for their next victim.Obviously that isn’t enough to deter Katsuki, whose never been one for her parents rules as the crown princess. She could protect herself, damnit! All she wanted was to see Izuku, who’d gone radio-silent for a few weeks too long. Fuck the monarchy and fuck the monsters, Katsuki was determined to find her lover after so long apart. She needed to let Izuku know how much she mis— how PISSED she is about being ghosted for so long.

fics.title: Dead if I Do Ya, Dead if I Don’t
fics.summary: “Oh, no, no, no… Do not fuckin’ look at me like that.”“But Kacchan—!” Izuku’s fingers wrap around his wrist desperately.“No. We’ve been plannin’ this shit for months. You’ve been begging—practically foaming at the mouth—for it. We’ve come way too far to not fuck—” Katsuki catches several disapproving looks and wide-eyed stares from onlookers that make him swallow some of his aggravation, despite the urge to tell them to mind their own damn business. “—To not fuckin’ do this,” he finishes quieter.Izuku and Katsuki hear about a killer on the loose targeting locals who lose their virginity. After a year of dating and a month of planning the perfect night, a fucking meteor hurdling towards the earth can't stop them from having their first time. Ignoring obvious warnings has obvious consequences.

fics.title: Victory Lap
fics.summary: It wasn’t often for a match of this much exhilaration to occur. Izuku didn’t even anticipate for things to go this far. It wasn’t as if he was concerned on who was in the right, since Katsuki was just as much in the wrong. Always allowing a vigilante like him to ‘slip away’ from his grasp each time, because deep down the both of them looked forward to these late-night occasions.This is the extent of their shared secret.

fics.title: End of the Hunt
fics.summary: Katsuki has been a Monster Hunter for most of his adult life. He's good at his job, makes decent money and is known worldwide. Of course, he is the best.There's a monster that has been giving him trouble, eluding him and acting in ways no other monster he's ever seen. But Katsuki is determined and will not stop hunting it until he finds it and gets rid of it like every other monster he's ever encountered.

fics.title: autumn town leaves
fics.summary: Katsuki and Izuku are supposed to be on a nice weekend getaway to the mountains to enjoy the autumn weather. They expect the perfect weekend of hiking, enjoying the fall colors, and maybe, just maybe, getting to confess some pretty deeply-repressed feelings.Except the tension between them is so thick it could snap, Katsuki finds himself in the clutches of villains, and Izuku is still having a whole complex over not being ready to be a pro hero again. So it looks like the romantic vacation might have to get put on hold.

fics.title: And if you go, I wanna go with you (and if you die, I wanna die with you)
fics.summary: Something bright catches Izuku's eye, a sticky note. Yellow, square, perfectly placed on his nightstand. He leans closer to read what was written on it, the handwriting is jagged, pressed too hard, the ink slightly smeared as if written in haste."Stop controlling your heart. Come to me."Or, Izuku doesn't know if he's just sleep deprived, going clinically insane... or just being straight up haunted.

fics.title: Code Drift
fics.summary: When a mission against a digital villain traps Izuku and Katsuki inside a looping game world without their memories, every reset blurs the line between code, and memory. They fight, fall for, and find each other again and again, until the only way out is to choose how to live, not just how to win. Each reboot of the game world introduces a new style of video game, and Izuku and Katsuki must adapt to every scenario, while they decide whether they trust each other.Code Drift is a character study and a visual journey through love and loss.The back wall of the room lit up with projections of Katsuki fighting off intruders, Katsuki in his furs cutting off the rope bridge from the shrine to the cliff, Katsuki with goggles on his head and a long black coat taking a wrench to hissing steam pipes.“He cut the rope, huh?” Izuku says, in a clipped voice. As if. As if he would take the coward’s route. If there was ever a bridge, Katsuki Bakugou would be standing dead-center, sword slung over his shoulder, yelling that you’re late and to hurry the fuck up already the moment Izuku appeared on the horizon.[Mission parameters: defeat Katsuki Bakugou]“Yeah, yeah.”

fics.title: i fell heavy into your arms
fics.summary: Katsuki and his friends are on their way to a Halloween party when suddenly and randomly, Katsuki starts hearing voices. Or, rather, one voice. He doesn’t know who it is or where it’s coming from, but it seems to know him well.He isn’t sure how to feel about that, and he’s even less sure of how to figure out where it’s coming from. There’s got to be a believable explanation for this, after all.
